import React from "react"; import { Sparkles, MoreHorizontal, Heart, MessageCircle, Share2, Bookmark, ExternalLink } from "lucide-react"; import { Card, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardContent, } from "@/components/ui/card"; import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { Avatar, AvatarFallback } from "@/components/ui/avatar"; const data = { "avatarInitials": "AB", "name": "Alex Brown", "badge": "Pro", "handle": "@alexbrown", "timeAgo": "2h ago", "postContent": "Just shipped a new feature! 🚀 Really excited about this one - it's going to make everyone's workflow so much smoother. Check it out and let me know what you think!", "linkTitle": "New Feature Announcement", "linkUrl": "blog.example.com", "likes": "128", "comments": "24" }; export default function CardSocialPostExample() { return ( {data.avatarInitials}
{data.name} {data.badge}

{data.handle} • {data.timeAgo}

{data.postContent}

{data.linkTitle}

{data.linkUrl}

); }
